outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: Kharg Island raid spares oil but not questions — Trump's escalation gamble deepens
outlets.summary: Analysis of Trump's Kharg Island strike — military targets destroyed but oil infrastructure spared as bargaining chip. 120 House Democrats demand answers on school strike.

outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Pentagon admits Iran wasn't planning preemptive strike — but 15,000 targets hit anyway
outlets.summary: Investigative reporting questions war rationale. Pentagon underestimated Iran's willingness to close Hormuz. White House blasted CNN for coverage. Covers Marines deployment and ground operations possibility.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: US lifts Russian oil sanctions as Iran war pushes energy crisis to breaking point
outlets.summary: Frames Russia sanctions waiver as geopolitical failure — war forcing US to facilitate Russian oil trade. Covers Lebanon bridge destruction and mounting civilian toll across region.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: All 6 KC-135 crew dead, 2,200 Marines heading to Middle East as war enters third week
outlets.summary: Focus on human cost — 13 US service members dead, 140+ wounded. Ground operations not ruled out. War costs already at $11.3B in first 6 days alone.

outlets.name: The Hill
outlets.headline: Trump announces devastating Kharg Island bombing raid — calls it 'most powerful in Middle East history'
outlets.summary: Trump claims Kharg Island military targets obliterated. Hegseth declares Iran's military destroyed and combat ineffective. Oil infrastructure deliberately spared.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Trump says Khamenei 'damaged but alive,' urges Iranians to 'rise up' against regime
outlets.summary: Platform for Trump and Netanyahu interviews. Emphasis on military success — 15,000+ targets hit, Iran capabilities degraded 90-95%. Netanyahu vows 'many surprises' for next phase.

outlets.name: Daily Wire
outlets.headline: Hegseth: Iran's missile and drone capacity nearly eliminated — 'core mission' is nuclear program
outlets.summary: Supportive framing of Pentagon briefing. Marines deployment as show of strength. Focus on nuclear program as justification.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: US bombs Kharg Island as Baghdad embassy struck — Day 14 escalation spirals
outlets.summary: Double escalation: US hits Iran's oil hub military targets while IRGC missile strikes US Embassy Baghdad. NATO intercepts 3rd missile over Turkey. Guterres arrives in Beirut.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Israel destroys bridge in Lebanon, threatens 'Gaza-scale devastation' as death toll mounts
outlets.summary: Extensive coverage of Lebanon civilian toll — 773 killed, 800K+ displaced. First civilian infrastructure strike. Day 14 liveblog covers Gulf attacks, Tehran explosion, Marines deployment.

outlets.name: BBC
outlets.headline: Iran war Day 14: Marines deployed as oil surges past $103 and Russia sanctions waived
outlets.summary: Comprehensive Day 14 coverage. Focus on economic fallout — Brent above $103, gas prices surging. US forced to waive Russia sanctions. 46,000+ flights cancelled since war began.

outlets.name: Euronews
outlets.headline: Saudi Arabia intercepts dozens of Iranian drones as war nears third week
outlets.summary: Gulf state perspective — Saudi intercepted ~50 drones, UAE 278 ballistic missiles total. French soldier killed. EU condemns Russia sanctions waiver.

outlets.name: Israel Hayom
outlets.headline: State Dept puts $10M bounty on Mojtaba Khamenei — US targets Iran's leadership directly
outlets.summary: $10M reward for information on Iran's Supreme Leader and 7 IRGC commanders. Netanyahu claims Israeli strikes killed nuclear scientists.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Netanyahu holds first press conference, scoffs that Khamenei can't 'show his face'
outlets.summary: Netanyahu's first war press conference. Vows 'many surprises' for next phase. Day 14 liveblog covers all fronts. Defense chief says Israel holds Lebanese territory until Hezbollah disarms.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: 11 cluster missiles penetrated — Iran's new weapon challenges Israeli air defenses
outlets.summary: Investigative piece on cluster munition penetration. 2 killed, 50+ wounded in single strike. Iran using banned cluster warheads on ~half of missiles. IDF admits new challenge.

outlets.name: Iran International
outlets.headline: Iran threatens oil company strikes after Kharg Island raid — warns US allies are targets
outlets.summary: Tehran warns it will strike oil companies with US connections if Kharg oil infrastructure is targeted. IRGC claims 48th phase of retaliation after embassy strike.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: 15,000+ targets hit by US — Iran vows to expand war to new fronts
outlets.summary: Frames war as Western aggression. Covers Mojtaba Khamenei's vow to keep Hormuz closed and demand US base closures. Larijani: war won't end until enemies are 'sorry.' Reports on yuan-denominated oil trade proposal.

outlets.name: IRNA
outlets.headline: Al-Quds Day rally explosion — Iranian people defiant despite US-Israeli bombing
outlets.summary: State agency reports Al-Quds Day rally explosion as evidence of enemy sabotage. Internet at 4% — state controls nearly all information flow. Reports on 2,200 Marines as escalation.
